summary: All Prep Report tab bug fixes verified and working. Tested: (1) Department dropdown opens as modal with 3 options (Dough Section, Top Room, Angels Section), (2) Selecting department updates table with correct items, (3) Reported by dropdown opens as modal showing staff for selected department, (4) Table displays correct columns (Dough, Items, Today, Tmrw, Prepared, Not Done), (5) Print and Share PDF buttons visible and styled (brown and red), (6) Send via WhatsApp button visible with green styling, (7) Prepared column has editable input fields that calculate Not Done column dynamically.

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All Prep Report tab features working

context_for_next_testing_agent: Prep Report tab fixes verified: (1) dropdownContent style properly applied to Department and Reported by modals, (2) onStartShouldSetResponder added for proper touch handling, (3) prepActionRow, printButton, pdfButton styles added and working. All dropdown modals open correctly with proper styling and staff lists load per department.
